embed.disclosurePrefix: Messages and relevant course-material excerpts are sent to Cerebras for AI inference. Responses may be inaccurate; verify with course materials. See
embed.sourceUnavailable: Source content not available for viewing

ltiBind.title: Link this course to Minerva
ltiBind.description: The first time this LMS course launches Minerva, pick which Minerva course it should open. Coming from {{platform}}, course: {{context}}.
ltiBind.linkNote: This link is remembered; all future launches from this LMS course open the same Minerva course.
ltiBind.nonTeacherRoleWarning: The LMS hasn't sent a teacher role for you, but we found Minerva courses you can manage. Continue only if you intend to bind this LMS course.
ltiBind.notTeacherTitle: Ask a teacher to set this up
ltiBind.notTeacherBody: You don't appear to be a teacher on any Minerva course. Ask a course teacher to open this activity once from {{platform}} ({{context}}) so they can link it to their Minerva course.
ltiBind.errorTitle: Couldn't open the Minerva link picker
ltiBind.missingToken: This page requires a bind token. Launch Minerva from your LMS to get here.
ltiBind.loadFailed: Something went wrong loading the link page. Try launching Minerva from the LMS again.
